identity.name: ScribeAI
identity.description: A minimalist, distraction-free handwritten notes digitizer that transforms physical chaos into digital order.
identity.archetype: The Soft Utility (Swiss Precision + Organic Warmth)

usage.brand: Use Primary Blue (#2563EB) only for key actions (Upload, Save).
usage.text: Never use pure black (#000000). Use Zinc-900 (#18181B) for high contrast text.
usage.surfaces: Use off-white (#FAFAFA) for the main background to reduce eye strain, pure white (#FFFFFF) for active cards/sheets.

grids.library: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-6

cards.style: bg-card text-card-foreground rounded-xl border border-border/50 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-300

inputs.style: rounded-lg border-input bg-transparent px-3 py-2 text-sm shadow-sm placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

components.toast: Use 'sonner' for all notifications. Position: bottom-right.

visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid var(--border). Use 'border-dashed' for upload zones.
visual_enhancers.gradients: Avoid strong gradients. Use subtle fades for text-overflow or loading states.

motion.guidelines: Use framer-motion for page transitions and list entry (staggered). Micro-interactions on hover (slight lift -translate-y-1).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text contrast ratio >= 4.5:1. Use Zinc-500 for secondary text, Zinc-900 for primary.
accessibility.focus: Visible focus rings on all interactive elements.

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5px or 2px. Consistent sizing (w-4 h-4, w-5 h-5).
icons.usage: Use icons to support text labels, not replace them (except for common actions like Trash/Edit).

images.strategy: Use abstract minimal illustrations for empty states. Use user-uploaded content as primary visuals.

dashboard.header: Clean, sticky header with Search and Profile.
dashboard.empty_state: Centered, welcoming message with a clear 'Upload Note' CTA.

upload.zone: Large drag-and-drop area. Dotted border. Animated icon on hover.
upload.progress: Visual progress bar with percentage and current step ('Scanning...', 'Extracting...', 'Finalizing').

editor.layout: Split pane. Left: Zoomable Image Canvas. Right: Rich Text Editor.
editor.toolbar: Floating or fixed at top of editor pane.

universal_guidelines: Do not use generic centered layouts everywhere.
Create depth through layered design elements (z-index).
Use glass-morphism effects for sticky headers and overlays.
Do NOT use 'transition: all'. Animate specific properties.
Do NOT center align the app container (.App { text-align: center }).
